name: flow-guard does not emit a warning when tool-switch count in the window is below the configured threshold
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/flow-guard && printf '{"tool":"Bash","at":"2026-05-13T00:00:00Z"}\n{"tool":"Bash","at":"2026-05-13T00:00:10Z"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/flow-guard/recent.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/flow-guard/check.sh" --window-min 5 --threshold 5 --now 2026-05-13T00:01:00Z 2>out.txt && ! grep -q 'warning' out.txt && grep -q 'thrash_count=0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
